name: Google Gemini Effect
description: An animated SVG effect inspired by Google's Gemini product, featuring flowing multi-colored lines that respond to scroll position.
whenToUse: Use for hero sections or feature introductions where you want a dramatic, flowing line animation tied to scroll progress.

props.name: pathLengths
props.description: Framer Motion values controlling the draw progress of each SVG path

props.name: title
props.description: Title text displayed above the effect

props.name: description
props.description: Description text displayed below the title
